creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
clsung      2007-12-12 06:23:01 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    www                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    www/p5-HTML-Sanitizer Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  This module acts as a filter for HTML. It is not a validator, though
  it might be possible to write a validator-like tool with it. It's
  intended to strip out unwanted HTML elements and attributes and leave
  you with non-dangerous HTML code that you should be able to trust.
  
  WWW:    http://search.cpan.org/dist/HTML-Sanitizer/
  
  PR:             ports/117784
  Submitted by:   Gea-Suan Lin <gslin at gslin.org>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1918    +1 -0      ports/www/Makefile
  1.1       +23 -0     ports/www/p5-HTML-Sanitizer/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/www/p5-HTML-Sanitizer/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/www/p5-HTML-Sanitizer/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/www/p5-HTML-Sanitizer/pkg-plist (new)
